title: What’s Happening in EM: Carry Trades Energized by Low Volatility
title_cn: 新兴市场正在发生什么：低波动性推动套利交易
summary: This week, Subhadip Sircar and Bhaskar Dutta discuss how carry trades are being re-energized by falling volatility in emerging-market currencies.

title: NYC Reports Second Death Linked to Legionnaires Outbreak: CBS
title_cn: 纽约报告第二例与退伍军人爆发有关的死亡：哥伦比亚广播公司
summary: New York City reported its second death connected to the Legionnaires disease outbreak on the Upper East Side, CBS said, citing a statement from the health commissioner.

title: Hot Pursuit!: Constantin Buschmann (Podcast)
title_cn: 热力追击！：康斯坦丁·布施曼（播客）
summary: Brabus owner and CEO Constantin Buschmann joins the show to talk about his life running the company his father co-founded in Bottrop, Germany, in 1977 - and why it was time to debut the newest car from Brabus, the $1 million Bodo. Plus the BMW M2 versus the BMW M4 and why everyone in the car world needs to start talking about tinnitus.

title: Masters in Business: Jason Wenk (Podcast)
title_cn: 商业硕士：Jason Wenk（播客）
summary: Barry speaks with Jason Wenk, founder and CEO of Altruist, a modern custodian for independent financial advisors. They discuss how Jason started the company and his plans to change asset management. Jason also weighs in on the state of RIAs, and AI.

summary: Source: Bloomberg, 37:16

title: Engine Maker CFM Seeks to Lift Deliveries to Help Jet Output
title_cn: 发动机制造商 CFM 寻求提高交付量以帮助喷气式飞机输出
summary: CFM International, which provides engines to Boeing Co. and Airbus SE for their single-aisle airliners, aims to deliver 15% more units this year to support an increase in aircraft production, with jet power plants turning into a major choke-point for output.

title: Distressed US Companies Find a British Detour Around Chapter 11
title_cn: 陷入困境的美国公司绕道英国《破产法》第十一章
summary: UK plans that cut debt, preserve equity and avoid the public glare are catching on

title_cn: 伊朗加大对美国盟友的攻击力度，国际足联关注野火等
summary: Source: Bloomberg, 0:00

title: HDFC Bank Profit Falls Short as Net Interest Margins Shrink
title_cn: 由于净息差缩水，HDFC 银行利润下降
summary: HDFC Bank Ltd., India’s largest private sector lender facing investor scrutiny on governance concerns, posted lower-than-expected results as margins shrunk.

title: Iran Hits Kuwait After US Escalation, Canada Wildfires, More
title_cn: 美国升级、加拿大山火等后，伊朗袭击科威特
summary: Source: Bloomberg, 0:00

title: Telecom Italia Board Endorses Poste Italiane’s €10.8 Billion Takeover Offer
title_cn: 意大利电信董事会批准意大利邮政 108 亿欧元的收购要约
summary: Telecom Italia SpA’s board unanimously endorsed Poste Italiane SpA’s €10.8 billion ($12.4 billion) takeover offer as financially fair, the company said in a statement on Saturday.

title: US, Iran Launch Fresh Strikes After Two Troops Die in Jordan
title_cn: 两名士兵在约旦死亡后，美国和伊朗发起新的打击
summary: The US and Iran engaged in another wave of tit-for-tat attacks, signaling no let-up after strikes by the Islamic Republic killed two American service members in Jordan on Friday.

title: Caspian Pipeline Consortium Halts Loadings After Drone Strike
title_cn: 里海管道财团在无人机袭击后停止装载
summary: Oil loading at the Caspian Pipeline Consortium’s terminal on Russia’s Black Sea coast was halted after a drone strike.

title: South Korea Details Plan for Foreigners to Trade Won Easier
title_cn: 韩国详细计划让外国人更容易贸易
summary: South Korea laid out a detailed plan to make the won freely tradable among foreigners, its boldest step yet to liberalize the forex market and bring the currency closer to full convertibility.

title: Jingye Says It Reserves Legal Rights in UK Steel Nationalization
title_cn: 敬业称保留英国钢铁国有化的合法权利
summary: Jingye Steel Co. has reserved all legal rights, including international arbitration, over the UK government’s nationalization of British Steel.

title: Venezuela’s Official Earthquake Death Toll Rises to 5,119
title_cn: 委内瑞拉官方地震死亡人数上升至 5,119 人
summary: The official death toll from the twin earthquakes that struck Venezuela last month rose to 5,119, according to National Assembly head Jorge Rodríguez.

title: Korea’s AI-Heavy Market Now Sets the Tone for Global Stocks
title_cn: 韩国人工智能市场为全球股市定下基调
summary: For fund managers in London, New York and Tokyo, a new ritual has emerged before trading gets underway: checking South Korean stocks.

title: Vanishing CLO Profits Are Sparking Infighting: Credit Weekly
title_cn: CLO 利润消失正在引发内讧：《信贷周刊》
summary: A type of investment that once generated some of Wall Street’s juiciest fixed-income returns has deteriorated so badly that investors are heading for the exits and arguing about who’s to blame.

title: Kuwait Energy Infrastructure Hit During Intense Iran Attacks
title_cn: 科威特能源基础设施在伊朗猛烈袭击中受损
summary: Kuwait suffered one of its worst nights of Iranian retaliatory attacks since the Middle East conflict began, with strikes on an oil facility and a second power plant hit in as many days.

title: Alibaba’s Qwen Unveils Preview of Flagship AI Model
title_cn: 阿里巴巴Qwen发布旗舰AI模型预览
summary: Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. launched a preview version of its flagship Qwen3.8 Max model, which it described as comparable to leading frontier AI models and second only to Anthropic PBC’s Fable 5.

title: Singapore Eyes Hedge Fund Tax Cuts to Boost Hub Role: FT
title_cn: 新加坡着眼于对冲基金减税以提升枢纽地位：金融时报
summary: The Monetary Authority of Singapore has held talks with investment firms on reducing taxes for fund managers in a bid to maintain the island’s competitiveness and retain talent, the Financial Times reported.

title: China’s Moonshot Plans IPO in Six Months After AI Breakthrough
title_cn: 人工智能突破后，中国登月计划在六个月内首次公开募股
summary: Moonshot AI has told investors it’s preparing to list in as early as six months, seizing the opportunity to tap capital markets after its latest model upended industry perceptions of China’s burgeoning capabilities and sent global tech stocks reeling.

title: Russia Hits Kyiv With Largest Ballistic Missile Barrage
title_cn: 俄罗斯以最大规模的弹道导弹袭击基辅
summary: At least one person was killed in what Ukraine’s foreign minister called the largest ballistic missile barrage aimed at Kyiv since the start of the Russia’s invasion more than four years ago.

title: Merz Sees Chance for Broader Cabinet Reshuffle After Spahn Exit
title_cn: 默茨认为斯潘退出后有机会进行更广泛的内阁改组
summary: German Chancellor Friedrich Merz said the departure of the conservative bloc’s parliamentary group leader Jens Spahn has opened up the possibility of a broader government reshuffle.

title: Singapore Opposition Party’s Kenneth Jeyaretnam Dies at 67
title_cn: 新加坡反对党领袖 Kenneth Jeyaretnam 去世，享年 67 岁
summary: Kenneth Jeyaretnam, the leader of Singapore’s opposition Reform Party, has died. He was 67.

title: Hitler’s Birthplace Becomes Police Station to Keep Nazi Pilgrims Away
title_cn: 希特勒出生地变身警察局，驱赶纳粹朝圣者
summary: Austria will open a police station in the building where Adolf Hitler was born in 1889, aiming to end decades of public debate on how to prevent it from becoming a pilgrimage destination for far-right extremists.

title: Burnham to Scrap UK Digital ID to Focus on Cost of Living Policies
title_cn: 伯纳姆将废除英国数字身份证以专注于生活成本政策
summary: Andy Burnham will ditch plans for a government-issued digital ID for all British adults in a “reset of priorities” when he becomes prime minister on Monday.

title: Zelenskyy Tasks Political Novice to Get Ukraine Through Winter
title_cn: 泽伦斯基责成政治新手帮助乌克兰度过冬天
summary: President Volodymyr Zelenskyy is turning to a technocratic energy executive with no cabinet experience or political ties as his prime minister to prepare Ukraine to survive another winter of war.

title: Cuban Dissident Freed by Havana After Five Years Arrives in US
title_cn: 古巴持不同政见者抵达美国五年后被哈瓦那释放
summary: A Cuban dissident and artist arrived in Miami in an unusual prisoner release by the island’s authorities, as Cuba faces an economic pressure campaign by President Donald Trump’s administration.

title: US Strikes Iran to ‘Punish’ It for Attack That Killed 2 Troops
title_cn: 美国打击伊朗以“惩罚”其造成两名士兵死亡的袭击
summary: The US launched fresh strikes on Iran Saturday, a day after two American service members were killed in Jordan by Iranian missile and drone attacks.

title: Brazil’s Justice Moraes Bars Milei From Visiting Jair Bolsonaro
title_cn: 巴西法官莫赖斯禁止米莱探访贾尔·博尔索纳罗
summary: Brazil Supreme Court Justice Alexandre de Moraes denied a request for Argentine President Javier Milei to visit former Brazilian President Jair Bolsonaro, citing a 30-day suspension of all non-essential visits imposed this week while the former president is under house arrest.

title: Hungary’s President Ends His Own Term in Bow to New Premier
title_cn: 匈牙利总统结束自己的任期，向新总理致敬
summary: Hungarian President Tamas Sulyok signed a constitutional amendment ending his presidency, capping Prime Minister Peter Magyar’s rapid effort to dismantle key pillars of the Viktor Orban era.

title: Two US Troops Killed, One Missing After Iran Strikes Neighbors
title_cn: 伊朗袭击邻国后两名美军死亡，一名失踪
summary: Two American service members were killed, four were injured and one is missing after an Iranian attack in Jordan, the US military announced, following several days of intensifying strikes from both sides.

title: GOP Lawmaker Ralph Norman Says He Will Seek Graham’s Senate Seat
title_cn: 共和党议员拉尔夫·诺曼表示，他将寻求格雷厄姆的参议院席位
summary: Republican Representative Ralph Norman said he will run for South Carolina’s open Senate seat, setting up a potential primary contest with the late Senator Lindsey Graham’s sister.

title: Iran, US Strikes Ramp Up as Tehran Declares Peace Deal Abandoned
title_cn: 德黑兰宣布放弃和平协议，伊朗和美国加强打击
summary: Iran unleashed heavy attacks on Gulf neighbors in retaliation for the latest US strikes as Tehran said it was suspending its commitments under the interim peace deal.

title: Merz Ally Spahn Quits After Surrogacy Sparks Party Backlash
title_cn: 代孕引发政党强烈反对后，默兹·艾莉·斯潘退出
summary: Jens Spahn, a senior leader in Chancellor Friedrich Merz’s conservative party, resigned after coming under pressure for fathering a child through a surrogate in the US despite previously opposing efforts to legalize the practice in Germany.
